piper_bin.description: Path or name of the piper executable. The default expects piper to be on $PATH.

voice_id.description: Piper voice ID to auto-download on first use (e.g. en_GB-northern_english_male-medium). Set via the setup wizard.

voice_model_path.description: Optional override: filesystem path to a Piper voice model (.onnx). Leave blank to auto-download and use voice_id.

ffmpeg_bin.description: Path or name of ffmpeg, used to convert Piper's WAV output to OGG/Opus for Telegram voice notes (and the inbound OGG -> WAV conversion for STT).

max_chars.description: Skip TTS for replies longer than this many characters. Voice notes for very long replies feel punishing on the listener side.

default_enabled.description: Whether new chats default to voice replies on. Most users want to opt in per chat with /voice on.

whisper_bin.description: Path or name of the whisper.cpp CLI used for voice-to-text. Other common names (whisper, whisper-cpp) are tried automatically.

whisper_model_id.description: Whisper model id to auto-download on first use (e.g. ggml-tiny.en for Pi 4, ggml-base.en for mini-PC). Pulled from huggingface.co/ggerganov/whisper.cpp.

whisper_model_path.description: Optional override: filesystem path to a ggml whisper model (.bin). Leave blank to auto-download and use whisper_model_id.

stt_max_duration_sec.description: Skip transcription for voice notes longer than this many seconds. Long notes can pin the CPU for tens of seconds on a Pi.

stt_language.description: ISO-639-1 language code for transcription, or 'auto' to let whisper detect. The default English-only models (ggml-*.en) ignore this.

stt_default_enabled.description: Whether new chats default to voice transcription on. Most users opt in per chat with /voice transcribe on.
